author: IGGITA K
title: Wtf
content:
Lately the player has been performing terribly. It constantly lags, barely scrolls, doesn’t show connected folders, playlists take forever to open, adding music is extremely slow, and the app keeps freezing. At this point it’s basically unusable.
This is especially frustrating considering I have a paid version and purchased a one-year subscription. What is going on, and why is this happening?

author: Vadim77z
title: Player
content: The best player in app store. 👍👍👍
